description: Phase 13C orphan resolution governance (analysis only, no orphan suppression).

PARENT_CLAIM_REMEDIATION.recommended_action: Resolve parent UNBALANCED claim via Phase 13B workflow then re-run prototype generation

ORPHAN_QUARANTINE.recommended_action: Quarantine orphan payment in audit outputs; exclude from production DBF until parent resolved

PRODUCTION_EXCLUDE_POLICY.recommended_action: Maintain orphan in governance reports; never silently drop from audit trail
